name: chio
description: Bond Claude Code to a Chio policy. Mediate every tool call; stream signed receipts.

policy_path.title: Policy path
policy_path.description: Path to the active Chio policy (.policy.yaml). Used by /chio:bond and the PreToolUse hook.

chio_binary.title: chio binary
chio_binary.description: Path to the `chio` CLI binary (default: chio on PATH).

service_token.title: Trust plane service token
service_token.description: Bearer token for the trust-control plane (only required when using a running `chio trust serve`).
